obs: Participated in guided tour at Modern Art Gallery on February 17th focused on Abstract Expressionism. Was amazed by the experience.
Fascinated by works of Jackson Pollock and Mark Rothko during Abstract Expressionism tour. Studied their artistic techniques and creative processes.
Learned that Jackson Pollock was inspired by Navajo sand paintings, which influenced his spontaneous, gestural artistic approach.
Makes Old Fashioned cocktails every Friday evening. Prefers orange bitters to Angostura because it gives a nice twist to the classic recipe.
Planning to attend Speed Demons event at Willow Springs International Raceway in California on May 1st and 2nd. 5-hour drive from base.
Owns 2018 Ford Mustang GT. Recently purchased new tires before Turbocharged Track Days event. Considering upgrading camera body for better autofocus.
Got 50mm f/1.8 prime lens on March 10th. Got external flash unit on March 28th. Took test shots last weekend with both.
Bought digital logger to track car performance data. Event organizers at Willow Springs approved use as long as mounted securely and non-obstructive.
Booked Homewood Suites by Hilton Lancaster for trip to Willow Springs event. Hotel has parking suitable for car enthusiasts.
Planning hot air balloon ride on honeymoon. Friend Emily got engaged on hot air balloon ride, which inspired the idea.
Planning own wedding (date not specified). Recently returned from cousin's wedding in Chicago. Planning Napa Valley honeymoon.
Seeking song recommendations for wedding reception suitable for indoor and outdoor events. Interested in mix of classical romantic and modern songs.
Planning small, intimate bridal shower with close friends and family. Chose garden party theme. Planning DIY craft station.
Considering multiple craft ideas: flower crowns, wedding wishes cards, herb planters, lavender sachets, customized coasters, wish trees, seed bombs.
Recently read 'The Nightingale' and loved it. Posted review in 'Book Lovers' Facebook group and received 12 likes. Interested in similar historical fiction.
Enjoying morning walks in park. Loves how flowers are blooming increasingly each week. Finds walks refreshing and good for clearing mind.
Planning backyard BBQ for June. Creating playlist with summer-themed songs. Planning decorations: balloons, flowers, patio lights, lawn games.
Selected 'Sizzlin' Summer BBQ' as invitation title for June backyard gathering. Plans include grilled peach bruschetta and watermelon granita.
Planning photo booth with summer props (sunglasses, leis, hats, beach balls, inflatables, flower crowns) for BBQ event.
Made spaghetti Bolognese for first time last week using ground turkey instead of beef. Result was amazing. Got third meal from leftovers.
Experimenting with Indian and Korean recipes. Made chicken tikka masala and bibimbap. Recently attended Thai cooking class with sister.
Attended Thai cooking class with sister. Learned to make pad thai and green curry from scratch. Currently practicing skills at home.
Likes specialty coffee drinks, particularly making own lattes at home. Also enjoys herbal and green teas.
Enjoys red wine and occasionally craft beer. Interested in exploring different spirits and cocktail variations.
Started reducing carbon footprint 3 months ago. Using reusable cotton rounds for makeup removal. Carrying reusable bags to grocery shopping.
Switching to eco-friendly laundry detergent. Considering Seventh Generation and Ecover brands. Looking for refill options and discounts.
Interested in eco-friendly makeup removers and cleansers. Researching certifications like EWG Verified and Leaping Bunny to guide purchases.
Has two pets: Luna (cat or dog, unclear) and Max (puppy). Tracking pet expenses with budget template. Using Paws & Pals puppy food for Max.
Searching for flea and tick prevention for Max. Buying toys, chews, and supplies from online retailers. Getting Furminator brush for Luna.
Healthcare profession confirmed (pet budget suggests nurse or medical professional context). Has pets requiring ongoing care management.
Attended TechCon workshop on data visualization at San Francisco Convention Center. Impressed by Tableau's interactive dashboards.
Organizing notes and business cards from TechCon. Planning to follow up with contacts met at conference last month.
Invited to participate in Women in Tech panel discussion at upcoming conference. Focusing on diversity and inclusion in technology field.
Recently bought Mango asymmetrical sleeve top (saw on Instagram) and distressed denim jeans. Also purchased sneakers on sale. Developing personal style.
Planning to declutter closet. Getting rid of clothes that don't fit well and haven't worn in a while. Interested in organization strategies.
Following fashion influencers on Instagram for outfit inspiration. Discovered new influencer with similar style. Interested in expanding follower list.
Considering purchase of gaming chair. Researched Secretlab Omega, Herman Miller Aeron, and AKRacing Masters Series for ergonomics and comfort.
Wanting to get into painting as new hobby. Planning to start with basic materials and replicate styles they like. Excited to begin project.
Planning trip to Chicago next month. Attending friend's sister's law school graduation. Ceremony at Auditorium Theatre, Loop, 2pm Saturday.
Looking for flights $200-300 and hotels $100-150 per night. Wants to arrive day or two before graduation ceremony. Flying into O'Hare.
Planning 5-day trip to California next month for summer. Using packing list app on phone to organize essentials. Wanting to pack light and versatile items.
Interested in multipurpose clothing: scarves (blanket/accessory), travel pants, packable jackets, versatile dresses, quick-drying items. Uses packing cubes for organization.
Watching 'The Crown' on Netflix. Started about month ago. Currently on episode 7. Captivated by Charles and Diana storyline in new season.
Interested in historical dramas similar to 'The Crown'. Considering 'Victoria' and 'Poldark'. Fascinated by Victorian era specifically.
Watched 'Schitt's Creek' - binge-watched entire series in 2 weeks. Got family hooked on show. Loves Moira's character. Knows show has great humor.
Planning to watch 'Arrested Development' for witty humor and clever wordplay. Appreciates intricate storytelling and character development.
Planning workout routine for upcoming week. Interested in exercises targeting shoulders and legs. Wants to support muscle growth and recovery.
Interested in protein-rich foods for muscle growth and recovery. Exploring animal-based (chicken, fish, eggs) and plant-based (legumes, nuts) protein.
Interested in high-fiber foods for digestion and fitness support. Considering fruits, vegetables, legumes, whole grains, nuts, seeds.
Looking for healthy dessert options low in sugar to support fitness goals. Interested in fruit-based, baked goods, dairy-based, and vegan treats.
Seeking creative ways to stay motivated and accountable with fitness goals. Interested in accountability partners, motivation reminders, reward systems.
Participated in 'Walk for a Cure' charity walk on May 15th. Contributed $150 through sponsorships from friends and family for cancer research.
Attended charity gala organized by alma mater on May 8th. Donated $200 to support educational institution. Values giving back to former school.
Interested in summer charity runs and walks. Focuses on cancer research and animal welfare causes. Planning to participate in more events.
Interested in Smoked Cherry Old Fashioned recipe. Plans to use Maker's Mark bourbon, Cherry Heering liqueur, Smoked Honey Syrup by Honey Ridge Farms.
Bought stackable containers for kitchen cabinets for better organization. Makes cooking easier by improving accessibility to stored items.
Actively reducing food waste. Made chicken fajitas last week and got three separate meals from one preparation. Practices conscious meal planning.
Interested in Mushroom and Spinach Cream Pasta. Prefers fresh spinach over frozen. Plans to add cherry tomatoes for color.
Interested in Korean-Style Fried Chicken using gochugaru. Also making other Korean dishes. Exploring gochujang marinades and Korean cooking techniques.
Works as software engineer. Developing own comedic voice based on tech workplace experiences. Incorporating software engineering humor into comedy.
Developing standup comedy routine. Interested in recording comedy videos for YouTube. Researching home recording studio setup with camera, microphone, lighting.
Struggles with online dating. Uses this experience as material for comedy routines about dating app challenges and modern romance.
Interested in income inequality as social issue. Discussed Germany's progressive taxation and social welfare approach. Values education as inequality reducer.
Interested in African decolonization history, particularly Mau Mau Uprising in Kenya. Explored connections between decolonization and independence movements.
Asked about ERC-721 functions vs custom functions in Ethereum smart contracts. Interested in difference between standard and custom implementations.
Interested in network administration and balancing security with user accessibility. Concerned about multi-factor authentication, access controls, encryption.
